programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We especially like to use summer berries in a no-bake pie. We wanted a no-bake pie that was every bit as appealing as a traditional double-crust pie—without all of the work.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.desc: Speed goes for a drive with Trixie and makes a new friend named Jeanine. Jeanine is a girl who is fond of automobiles and aspires someday to become a racer. However, it turns out that her father despises cars because he has lost his son in a car accident.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: During a race in a desert, Speed meets Dr. Bone, an old archaeologist who was critically injured. It turns out that he was attacked during his search for his daughter, Calcia, who has disappeared after discovering Cleopatra’s Tomb.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After being struck on the head by a falling rock, Calcia has come to believe herself to be Cleopatra, and has built a kingdom with her followers in the ruins.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed struggles with the Snake Track, a course with seven tough curves. He drives his car without a clue and finds a man called Rock Force, who outmaneuvered a mysterious car that has chased after him by driving on two wheels.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On a stormy night, Lamster, a man who escaped from prison, arrives at the home of Delicia, Spritle's girlfriend who is blind. The next day, Lamster forces Speed who showed up to Delicia's house, to drive the Mach 5 to Big Baldy Mountain.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: In the darkness, an assassin gang invades the Cupola Castle and plants a bomb to kill the President of Acquirian. Meanwhile, Speed races against Racer X and becomes the champion of the Fujiyama Grand Prix.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed tracks down the assassin gang to an old oriental castle but ends up being captured by assassins who were awaiting him.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After winning a race abroad, Speed saves a girl, Tanya, who was being attacked by a group of men in town. Tanya tells Speed that her brother, the chief of her tribe, was bitten by a viper, and the serum must be delivered within three hours.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed test-drives a supersonic rocket car designed by Pops Racer for the Vavoom Motor Company to challenge speed records. However, the car gets seriously damaged during the test run, and the test ends in failure.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After checking the track of Transafrica Grand Prix, Speed boards an airplane with a biology professor named Carnivore. Suddenly, the pilots threaten Carnivore at gunpoint and parachute off the plane with him.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On the way to an evil mountain where monsters are said to dwell, Speed chases a weird tank that appears in the jungle and finds a secret base at a lake.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and Trixie participate in the Monte Carlo Rally, but the Mach 5 is hijacked in the Alps during a snowstorm by a man with an injured right hand.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: An assassin with a rifle is attempting to shoot the Princess who is in the royal box to wave the starting flag for the Mystic Grand Prix. However, the plot fails due to mirror reflection.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed escapes from a trap set by the assassin gang, and prevents the assassination of the President of Avalonia, the next target of the assassins. The Vice President and his secretary invite Speed to their official residence.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: To participate in a race in the United States, Speed and Trixie board a passenger plane. Dr. Fantasty, a developer of a new type of rocket fuel, is also aboard.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: There is an ongoing mystery that unmanned cars suddenly drive away and disappear. To date, 48,000 cars have gone missing. The police request Speed to track down those unmanned cars as they are not able to catch them.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed joins the Pineapple Grand Prix, a series of grueling courses. In honor of the legend that originated the race, racers are obligated to carry pineapples during the race. Then, it turns out that one of the pineapples has a stolen jewel inside.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On a plane to Hong Kong to join a race, Speed witnesses a man being murdered with a poisoned needle, but someone kills the assassin lady to seal her mouth.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and Trixie arrive at an airport to head for Hawaii and stumble across a shooting incident aiming at a stranger man and a girl. After their arrival to Hawaii, they find the man they saw earlier dead.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Gadge is the father of Gismo, a boy Speed met at a car show. Gadge has a grudge against Speed as he was fired from his team after losing a race to Speed, and he has devoted himself to 'car wrestling,' in which cars smash and destroy each other.

programme.title: Speed Racer

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha and James both buy elephants after scouring the antique shops of Devon and Somerset. The trip takes a dangerous turn when Braxton ends up on a race track in an old banger.

programme.desc: Natasha goes wild for chairs and James buys some less-than-pristine items as they explore the antiques emporia of Somerset and Wiltshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha discovers a Dutch masterpiece and has to haggle hard, while James pins his hopes on a naughty dog. Profits are much needed – will Wiltshire deliver?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James explores sheds stacked high with antiques and Natasha has an eye for some art as their tour reaches journey's end in Oxfordshire. Who will come out top dog?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: Antiques experts Izzie Balmer and David Harper make their way around Edinburgh and its surrounding towns in their classic car. When the shopping's done, off to auction they go!

programme.desc: Auctioneer Izzie Balmer and dealer David Harper travel around Fife, Perthshire and Angus searching for profitable antiques. A very rare jar causes excitement at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Scoreboard Final
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Morning Buzz
programme.desc: Start your day with the latest top sports headlines and highlights.

programme.title: Midday Rundown
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed on all the top trending stories dominating the sports world.

programme.title: Trending Now
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hipocresía
programme.desc: Frank no sabe qué hacer con la queja del ex policía Rick Austin (Evan Arthur Hall) sobre su pensión. Además, Jamie ayuda a un amigo, Connor O'Brien (Brian Hutchison), a lidiar con unas fotos ilícitas de su hija en Internet.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Estándares altos
programme.desc: Jamie y Frank chocan en sus puntos de vista sobre el trato que el público le dio a la policía después de que unos adolescentes revoltosos arrojaran agua sobre dos novatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos víctimas de asesinato se encuentran en una comunidad de West Virginia, el UAC descubre una disputa latente desde hacía tiempo entre dos familias, y se debe investigar cuál de ellos podría ser responsable de la muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble trabajo
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo nocturno de un especialista en polígrafos del NCIS toma un giro peligroso, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo tienen que descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Estándares altos
programme.desc: Jamie y Frank chocan en sus puntos de vista sobre el trato que el público le dio a la policía después de que unos adolescentes revoltosos arrojaran agua sobre dos novatos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos influyentes
programme.desc: Mientras Henry trabaja como asesor de investigación para los servicios de menores, Danny y él se enfrentan por un caso relacionado con un hombre volátil con su mujer.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Errores graves
programme.desc: Mientras trabaja en el caso de una niñera acusada de abusos, Erin no está de acuerdo con la asesora psiquiátrica, la doctora Alice Dornan (Jennifer Bowles), en cuanto a su diagnóstico y sugerencia de castigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es encontrada muerta en un club sólo para hombres, Danny y Baez investigan si su muerte fue un accidente o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unruly man gives deputies a hard time, witnesses call the cops when a well-dressed driver plows through multiple barricades, and a domestic call takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake. Officers investigate a car they spot swerving on the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest an uncooperative man with an outstanding warrant, discover marijuana paraphernalia during a traffic stop and investigate a dispute involving a pellet gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control of the vehicle and runs into a stop sign. With the aid of stop sticks, a driver’s car becomes disabled. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a drug house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team comes together after Warrick is shot in a Las Vegas alleyway, on the ninth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A hypnotist who uses her powers of persuasion to rob banks becomes the prime suspect in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a series of victims are found deceased seemingly in the middle of everyday activities, the CSIs must determine what is causing them to remain upright after death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, the CSIs discover that their victim, a young woman who was murdered and found with several different blood types in her system, is the daughter of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy occurs right in the middle of Koreatown, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a popular young singer is found dead outside an infamous Las Vegas nightclub, the CSI team uncovers a link between the present day crime and a murder from over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr. Raymond Langston, to gain access to the killer and get a crack in the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is shocked and saddened when, after working with Dr. Raymond Langston on the Dick & Jane murders, Grissom announces that his time as a CSI has come to an end and offers Langston a permanent position on the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The first day on the job for Dr. Langston turns from bad to worse when a simple burglary case quickly overlaps with a complicated arson and homicide case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de Nick sobre un paracaidista herido dará un giro cuando Catherine descubra que está relacionado con un caso de doble asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy se encuentran en una convención de ciencia ficción de uno de sus programas de televisión favoritos, terminan investigando el asesinato de uno de sus queridos actores.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisa uno de los primeros casos en los que trabajó como CSI cuando el delincuente condenado por el asesinato afirma que el veredicto se basó en pruebas defectuosas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: La Vida No Vale Nada
programme.desc: Con una perspectiva un poco fatalista sobre la naturaleza humana y la búsqueda de la felicidad a través del amor, Pablo experimenta de manera cínica algunas relaciones sin éxito.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: Philip Seymour Hoffman nos ofrece una actuación ganadora del Oscar® (2006, Mejor Actor) como Truman Capote, el cual se embarca en un viaje para investigar el asesinato de la familia Clutter en Kansas, lo que se convertirá en su libro más reconocido.

programme.title: Cinema Paradiso
programme.desc: En esta célebre película ganadora del Óscar a Mejor Película Extranjera, un famoso cineasta italiano, atormentado por los recuerdos de su primer amor, regresa a su pueblo natal después de 30 años de ausencia.

programme.title: Cómo termina
programme.desc: En esta comedia apocalíptica, Liza (Zoe Lister-Jones) hace un divertido viaje por Los Ángeles con la esperanza de llegar a la última fiesta antes del fin del mundo, y por el camino se encuentra con un variado elenco de personajes.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: El embajador del miedo
programme.desc: Mientras toda la nación ve avanzar la campaña presidencial hacia las elecciones, un soldado corre contra el tiempo para descubrir una conspiración detrás de ella, una conspiración que podría destruir a la democracia misma.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: El último beso
programme.desc: El último beso es una película de drama y comedia sobre la vida, el amor, la infidelidad, el perdón, el matrimonio y la amistad... y la aceptación de cumplir 30.

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: Serendipity ES

programme.title: Especialista

programme.title: Ya veremos

programme.title: Instructions Not Included

programme.title: Viernes 13 parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: De niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo algo que muchos murieron intentando hacer: mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino que aterrorizó a Crystal Lake. Ahora, años después, Tommy está atormentado por el temor de que Jason siga vivo.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: National Dog Mom's Day
programme.desc: During the second Saturday in May, National Dog Mom’s Day sends out a chorus of yips, barks, and howls of praise for all the dog mommas!

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: QI expert, Alan Davies, introduces incredible stories of Dog rescues from the RSPCA's Leybourne Animal Centre.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Staff tends to a poodle with a problem penis, a rabbit with an abscess, a cow with a neck wound, and an overly amorous donkey before gathering to say farewell to Sarah who is leaving to have a baby.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Lucy the Staffie cross has been kept inside a dark house for so long that it’s affected her eyes and she is extremely overweight.

programme.title: Dog School
programme.desc: Zeus, the Siberian Husky, is on a week-long sleepover at Day Care because his owners have gone on holiday. He’s finding the extended stay a bit tough and each day at the usual time, he waits at the gate for his owners to collect him.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy visits Safe in Austin, a rescue ranch for differently-abled animals. From Halo's new prosthetics to Cobb's new wheels, these animals show unstoppable spirit and resilience.

programme.title: Bionic Vet
programme.desc: See if high-tech vet Noel Fitzpatrick can get Oscar the cat back on his feet...his new bionic feet.

programme.title: The Litter: The Litter

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will be dragged behind a horse. Contestant will enter a elevator shaft and will be covered by approximately 400 rats. One at a time each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is raised by crane over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a ‘box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must get on a pole directly out, under the nose of a helicopter. Players will bob in cheese and then eat grasshoppers. Contestants are hung upside down into a Plexiglas tank filled with Eels. Contestants must drive up with only two wheels.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players climb out over the skid and underneath the helicopter. Contestants shoot at target, determining the number of boiled pig rectums they will have to eat. The contestant must navigate around the ledge of a tall building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be seated in a helicopter and hanging directly under the skids. One of the partners will be dangling by their ankles and hanging by their ankle.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Climb a rope ladder into a helicopter. To eat the blended concoction you are given. To move flags from the first to the last pole.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants fall out of a speeding helicopter. Contestant must consume 10 live slugs and a shot of cow bile. Each contestant must cross between two buildings by placing three planks in front of them on top of two tight ropes as they walk.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the female contestant will be placed in a cage that is hung from a helicopter and is approx. 20 feet in the air. A dumpster filled with disgusting garbage is placed at one end of an alley.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two large platforms are hanging below two helicopters. In this pairs stunt, each contestant will be seated in a barber chair. Contestants will each start out straddling the side of a container, at opposite ends, high in the air.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: Willa's Wild Life
programme.desc: Willa takes care of animals, so how difficult can it be to take care of a toddler for a hour? / The snooty girls make Willa feel bad about her hair.

programme.title: B.B. King - Life Of Riley
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this visually stunning film has an contributions by Bono, Eric Clapton, Bruce Willis, Bonnie Raitt, Dr. John and Keith Richards, as well as appearances by Mick Jagger and President Obama.

programme.title: ABBA: Super Troupe
programme.desc: Few bands have been able to dominate the industry in the same way as ABBA. Follow their journey to celebrity stardom, through archival interviews and performances from ABBA, with added inside knowledge from leading industry professionals.

programme.title: Beach Boys: Doin' It Again
programme.desc: To mark the group's 50th anniversary, Brian Wilson, Mike Love, Al Jardine, Bruce Johnston, and David Marks gathered in 2012 for an emotional reunion to record their first album of new material in 20 years and to kick off a worldwide tour.

programme.title: Becoming Queen
programme.desc: Led by the incomparable voice and showmanship of Freddie Mercury, Queen pioneered a unique brand of operatic rock that perfectly encapsulated the decadent excess of the 1970s. This documentary traces the history of the band.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Everlasting Words
programme.desc: These three brothers rose to the top of their profession. Writing all of their own hits, the harmonious family act became one of the world's best-selling artists of all time, selling over more than 220 million records worldwide.

programme.title: Bowie: The Man Who Changed The World
programme.desc: An inside look at David Bowie, one of the most creative and influential rock artists of all time. Featuring exclusive contributions from those who worked with David Bowie and archive interviews with the man himself.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Bowie; Iggy & Lou; The Sacred Triangle: 1971- 1973
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: The Sacred Triangle. By 1971, Bowie was branded a one-hit-wonder; Reed was considered washed up and Iggy Pop was seen as a drug crazed ex-Stooge. But a meeting of minds was the catalyst for a turnaround for these three geniuses.

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Busy Being Born

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Man lived with seven large Nile monitor lizards in his small studio apartment, and woman shared her home with more than 20 venomous snakes and lizards.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Hear the stories of people who keep dangerous big cats, such as tigers, lions, and leopards, as pets and learn how just one mistake can result in devastating consequences.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Chimpanzees, our closest animal relative, possess six times the strength of an average adult male and have the temperament of a five-year-old child. Despite their strength and their wild tendencies, some people believe chimps make loving companions.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In 2003, a 500-pound tiger was removed from a New York apartment in the notorious projects of Harlem. Veteran's tigers help him cope with his post-traumatic stress disorder, but another tragic story reminds us that predators can never be denied.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Anita Finch, a 33-year-old Californian woman was found dead in her trailer-park home, clutching a note with words, "Northfield Hospital, ask for ICU." How did her passion for nature develop into an obsession for venomous snakes?

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Bear Grylls eats a tarantula for breakfast and shows you how to survive hurricane season in the Dominican Republic.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant and his belligerent, kick-happy son. Then, Sonia and Froy crash a pool party where the guests were happy to give up their clothes, but they're not willing...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: For the special 100th episode of Forged in Fire, four bladesmiths are tasked with forging a chopper and must choose from a mammoth pile of metals and materials from all previous 99 episodes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on a date, David catches a disappearing act at a magic show but quickly becomes involved in the performance when the magician really vanishes.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don looks toward his newly found religious beliefs to help him contend with an escaped criminal bent on revenge.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only four hours to stop a group of hijackers who take a bus full of Hollywood tourists hostage.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for two women, neighbors, who were abducted in broad daylight. The case takes a surprising turn when the agents discover the identity of the abductor.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a man who is abducted while posing as a college student and discovers he has been faking his identity for years.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a mother and her infant son who disappear after attending a self-defense class.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing trial consultant. Recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL ("Las Vegas") appears as Kim Marcus, a juror whom the victim recently consulted.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing psychologist whose brother has a criminal past. Plus, Martin's relationship with Kim (recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL) heats up.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: As the team searches for a missing high-end Russian matchmaker, the agents find they have no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate the son of a billionaire who disappears after piloting a small plane that crashes in the woods. Recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL appears as Kim Marcus.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Narc

programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Bad Ass
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo)) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Based on the classic short story by Stephen King, CHILDREN OF THE CORN is a longtime horror favorite that has spawned six sequels and many imitations. See how it all started.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: When a mill is reopened, several employees meet their deaths. The killings all occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. the Graveyard Shift. Soon, the workers find a maze of tunnels leading to the cemetery and the horror that comes alive at night.

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner
programme.desc: An obese attorney accidentally runs down and kills an old gypsy woman. After her ancient father puts a curse on him, he starts losing weight, and cannot stop. Based on the Stephen King novel, written under the pseudonym Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A huge comet passes near the earth, vaporizing nearly the whole planet. But a few partially exposed people are now blood-thirsty zombies, and they begin a hunt for the remaining humans.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Jarrod and Elaine travel to Los Angeles to meet his friend Terry and his wife Candice. Terry gives a party in his apartment for Jarrod. The next morning, the group is awakened by beams of light. The group of friends try to escape from the alien invaders.

programme.title: The Remains of the Day
programme.desc: Oscar®-winners Anthony Hopkins (The Silence of the Lambs) and Emma Thompson (Howards End) reunite with the acclaimed Merchant Ivory filmmaking team for this extraordinary and moving story of blind devotion and repressed love. Rated PG

programme.title: The Ides of March
programme.desc: Ambition seduces and power corrupts in a nerve-wracking thriller from Academy Award nominated director George Clooney (Good Night, and Good Luck). Rating: R

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Rain Man
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as an idealistic young wheeler-dealer whose life is changed forever when he discovers he has an autistic savant older brother (Dustin Hoffman, in a Best Actor Oscar-winning performance).

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

programme.title: The Ides of March
programme.desc: Ambition seduces and power corrupts in a nerve-wracking thriller from Academy Award nominated director George Clooney (Good Night, and Good Luck). Rating: R

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Armed with only her sharp mind, blind faith and stubborn spirit, young Lara Croft pushes past her limits on her very first perilous adventure into the unknown. If she survives, it could be the making of her…earning her the name tomb raider.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch-rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: The corn tortilla is the canvas upon which Mexico creates some of its most classic cuisine. Rick shows us three styles of tortilla in Mexico City: steak tacos al carbon, bistec tacos a la plancha, and stewed tacos de guisado.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Did you know that the humble little meatball has a starring role in the Mexican kitchen? Explore traditional versions of albondingas in the old-school Bar Mancera, as well as modern versions in hipster haven Cicatriz, with Rick Bayless.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: San Pedro Atocpan is a small town that produces 60% of the mole eaten in Mexico. Taste mole in all its mouthwatering forms, including the elegant mole madre, red mole, and an herbacious mole verde with fish that will knock your socks off.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes, each one a meal in itself: a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: RiffTrax Special: 90s Cyber Thrillers

programme.title: RiffTrax: Rollergator

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: John Travolta plays Todd Lubitch, a boy who was born without any immunities and cannot venture outside his sterile environment, lest he slip on a banana peel and end up on America's Funniest Home Videos.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Guy From Harlem
programme.desc: As you'd expect from the title, The Guy from Harlem is set entirely in Miami. It's the story of private eye and titular Guy, Al Connors, a man with a reputation.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Night That Dracula Saved The World
programme.desc: While The Night that Dracula Saved the World does not have Harvey Korman, or crappy animation, or an elderly wookie pleasuring itself, it does have Judd Hirsch. Please do not go into this special expecting not to see Judd Hirsch. Fair warning.

programme.title: RiffTrax: To Catch a Yeti
